data.title: Guardian Metal Resources Raises £15,000 Through Warrant Exercise
data.description:
The latest update is out from Golden Metal Resources Plc ( (GB:GMET) ).

Guardian Metal Resources plc has announced the exercise of warrants over 40,000 new ordinary shares at an exercise price of 37.5p, raising £15,000 for the company. This move will increase the company’s issued share capital to 167,518,967 ordinary shares, impacting the total voting rights and potentially affecting shareholder interests under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

More about Golden Metal Resources Plc

Guardian Metal Resources plc is a tungsten exploration and development company.

data.title: Sokoman Minerals Resumes Deep Drilling at Moosehead Gold Project
data.description:
Sokoman Minerals Corp ( (TSE:SIC) ) has provided an update.

Sokoman Minerals Corp has announced the resumption of diamond drilling at its Moosehead Gold Project in Newfoundland, focusing on deep drilling to explore the Eastern and Western Trend gold zones. This initiative aims to extend the depth of known mineralization and discover new parallel zones, potentially enhancing the project’s value and impact on the company’s operations. The program includes significant drilling efforts to gather geological data critical for future exploration, with the potential to redefine the project’s scope and improve Sokoman’s industry positioning.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SIC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SIC is a Underperform.

Sokoman Minerals Corp’s stock is significantly impacted by weak financial performance, with substantial losses and negative cash flow posing major risks. While the company has no debt and recent strategic corporate events suggest potential improvements, technical indicators and negative valuation metrics further weigh on the stock. These factors combine to reflect a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SIC stock, click here.

More about Sokoman Minerals Corp

Sokoman Minerals Corp is a company in the mining industry, primarily focused on gold exploration. It operates the Moosehead Gold Project in central Newfoundland, which is 100% owned by the company. The company is engaged in identifying and expanding gold mineralization zones, with a focus on high-grade deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 392,922

data.title: Alien Metals Ltd Issues New Shares to Bolster Financial Position
data.description:
Alien Metals Ltd ( (GB:UFO) ) has provided an update.

Alien Metals Ltd has announced the issuance of 373,531,570 new ordinary shares following the exercise of warrants, raising approximately £410,721. These shares will be admitted to trading on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange, increasing the total number of ordinary shares to 9,226,890,356. This move is expected to enhance the company’s financial position and support its ongoing exploration and development projects, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about Alien Metals Ltd

Alien Metals Ltd is a mining exploration and development company listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange. The company focuses on delivering a profitable direct shipping iron ore operation from its 90% Hancock iron ore project in the central Pilbara region of Western Australia. Additionally, Alien Metals owns one of Australia’s largest PGM deposits, Munni Munni, and has interests in other exploration projects including the Elizabeth Hill Silver Project.

Average Trading Volume: 171,972,290

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £19.48M

data.title: Shandong Gold Mining Halts A Share Issuance Plan
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Shandong Gold Mining Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1787) ).

Shandong Gold Mining Co., Ltd. announced the termination of its planned issuance of A Shares to target subscribers and the withdrawal of related application documents from the Shanghai Stock Exchange. This decision follows a strategic review to optimize financing methods and reflects the company’s recent successful placement of H Shares. The move is likely to impact the company’s capital structure and may influence its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

data.title: Allegiant Gold Rebrands to A2 Gold Corp., Enhancing Market Presence
data.description:

Allegiant Gold Ltd. has announced a name change to A2 Gold Corp., effective September 16, 2025, with trading under the new name on the TSX Venture Exchange. The company’s ticker symbols remain unchanged, and no action is required from shareholders regarding the name change. This rebranding reflects Allegiant’s strategic focus on its gold exploration projects, particularly in Nevada, and may enhance its market presence and stakeholder engagement.

data.title: TheWorks.co.uk plc Announces LTIP Awards for Key Executives
data.description:

TheWorks.co.uk plc has announced the granting of Long Term Incentive Plan (LTIP) awards to its Chief Executive Officer, Gavin Peck, and Chief Financial Officer, Rosie Fordham. These awards, which are subject to performance conditions related to earnings and share price, reflect the company’s commitment to aligning leadership incentives with its financial performance and shareholder value. data.title: Rock Tech Lithium Completes $6.51 Million Private Placement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Rock Tech Lithium ( (TSE:RCK) ).

Rock Tech Lithium has successfully closed the third and final tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising a total of $6.51 million. The proceeds will be used to advance the Guben Converter project and for general corporate purposes, strengthening the company’s position in the battery materials market.

Rock Tech Lithium is a company focused on enabling the battery industry in Europe and North America by supplying high-quality, locally produced lithium. The company emphasizes responsible sourcing and circular economy principles, with projects in Guben, Germany, and Ontario, Canada, aimed at supporting the battery and automotive industries. Rock Tech sources raw materials from ESG-compliant suppliers and integrates recycled materials to enhance sustainability.
